role_title: Consumer Direct Growth and Sales Enablement
secondary_archetype: BizOps / Strategy & Ops — revenue growth operator / sales enablement senior IC in mortgage lending

level_signals: 8+ years of experience in consumer direct mortgage, fintech lending, or high-performance sales organizations
Described as 'a senior individual contributor role'
Operates independently and presents to senior/executive leadership
Accountable for measurable production impact without direct authority over headcount

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of experience in consumer direct mortgage, fintech lending, or high-performance sales organizations.
Demonstrated ownership of revenue-impacting initiatives at scale.
Proven experience building outbound marketing engines tied to measurable funded volume.
Strong understanding of mortgage conversion metrics, funnel analytics, and sales productivity modeling.
Advanced proficiency interpreting performance marketing KPIs (CPL, CAC, ROAS, lock rate, pull-through, cycle time).
Experience influencing cross-functional stakeholders (Sales, Marketing, Product, Ops) without direct authority.
Ability to operate independently in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.
Exceptional analytical and financial modeling skills.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Active NMLS license or prior experience as a Loan Officer.
Experience with real estate agent coaching or training.
Knowledge of specific local real estate markets.

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska (due to insurance coverage issues)

scope.surface: Home Loans Consumer Direct channel — inbound and outbound growth, sales enablement, lifecycle monetization
scope.business_model: B2C consumer direct mortgage lending, national bank
primary_metrics_inferred: Member lifetime value / repeat transaction volume
core_responsibilities: Manage and continuously optimize the end-to-end consumer funnel from acquisition through funded loan
Optimize and execute scalable outbound marketing strategies supporting a predominantly outbound sales force
Develop high-performance outbound and inbound sales frameworks
Translate marketing and sales performance data into actionable revenue strategies
Partner with Lifecycle Marketing to design nurture journeys for pre-application prospects, fall-out borrowers, and funded recapture opportunities
Support recruitment efforts for high-performing Consumer Direct Loan Officers

green_flags: Role is explicitly described as senior IC with clear scope and accountability — not vague
Detailed breakdown of responsibilities by percentage of time, indicating structured thinking about the role
Cross-functional scope spans Marketing, Sales, Data, and Ops — broad influence and visibility
SoFi is a scaled fintech/national bank with millions of members — meaningful market impact
red_flags: Base pay range referenced but not disclosed in the JD body — compensation transparency is low
Location type is entirely unclear — no city, no remote/hybrid/onsite indication in the JD body (only Hawaii/Alaska exclusion mentioned)
Role title ('Consumer Direct Growth and Sales Enablement') does not follow standard PM or Growth titling conventions — seniority and leveling ambiguous externally
5% of time allocated to talent/recruitment support is an unusual responsibility for a senior IC growth role — could indicate role scope creep
